Email.CombinedReportSubjectTemplate: CHEP Eastern Creek - AMV Combined Report - Shift {shift} - {date}
Email.CombinedReportBodyWithZip: Please find attached the AMV Combined Report for Shift {shift}, {date}. The Excel file contains: GOCATOR, TOP_LEADING_STATION, TOP_TRAILING_STATION, SIDE_STATION, BOTTOM_LEADING_STATION. A zipped Combined Power BI report (CSV) is also included for use in Power BI.
Email.CombinedReportBodyWithoutZip: Please find attached the AMV Combined Report for Shift {shift}, {date}. The Excel file contains: GOCATOR, TOP_LEADING_STATION, TOP_TRAILING_STATION, SIDE_STATION, BOTTOM_LEADING_STATION.
